message:
You are my fire
The one, desire
Believe when I say
I want it that way
author: backstreet zoey
comments:
Return to the course Zoey!!!
Liran misses you

message:
When you were young and your heart was an open book
you used to say "Live and let live"
But if this ever changing world in which we live in
Makes you give in and cry

Say "Live and let die"
author: guns & zoey
comments:
Return to the course Zoey!!!
Liran misses you
